decision_summary.rationale: Downsize primary instance first to ensure secondary can safely follow.

i-b301.technical_explanation: The primary instance meets the tightened thresholds for CPU usage, and downsizing to r5.large is safe and cost-effective.

cost_report.waste_evidence: P95 CPU (2.3%) and peak (9.2%) meet tightened thresholds.

decision_summary.rationale: Downsize secondary instance after primary to maintain data consistency.

i-b302.technical_explanation: The secondary instance can safely be downsized to r5.medium based on the primary instance's P99 CPU usage.

cost_report.waste_evidence: Primary P99 CPU (6.1%) allows safe downsize to r5.medium.

decision_summary.rationale: No waste pattern detected; instance is already optimally sized.

i-b303.technical_explanation: The analytics replica instance is already optimally sized and does not exhibit any waste patterns.

llm_response.group_summary: All instances are covered. Primary instance should be downsized first to ensure secondary can safely follow. Total savings: $136.08/month ($1,632.96/year).

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report covers the multi-instance structure and group aggregation correctly, but technical explanations are generic and thinly grounded — they cite a few metrics without explaining detection rationale, instance names, or why alternatives were rejected.
